query:
SELECT s.id AS "id!"
          FROM samples s
         WHERE s.estado = 'activo'
           AND s.creador_id <> ALL($2::int[])
           AND NOT EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM reproducciones r
                WHERE r.usuario_id = $1
                  AND r.sample_id = s.id
           )
         ORDER BY RANDOM()
         LIMIT $3
